title: 6PCS HSS Drill Bit Set for Metal, M3 M4 M5 M6 M8 M10 Metric Drill and Tap Set, 3-in-1 Combination Threading Tool with 1/4" Hex Shank & Anti-Rust Coating, Professional Hard Steel Drill Bits
features: 【3-in-1 Professional Solution】This versatile set combines drill and tap bits in one efficient tool. The HSS drill bit set with the twisted spiral flutes allows you to drill and thread in one step, eliminating tool changes and saving valuable time on any metalworking project. It's the ultimate tap and die set alternative for professionals and DIY enthusiasts.

【Premium HSS Construction】Crafted from high-speed steel, these taps drill bits are built for durability and performance. The material retains its hardness even under high temperatures, making these drill bits for metal ideal for continuous use on tough materials like hard steel, stainless steel, and iron.

【Precision Engineering for Flawless Results】Each of these taps drill bits tools features precisely engineered flutes that effectively remove chips and prevent clogging. This design ensures clean, accurate threads every time, making this tap and die sets metric perfect for creating perfect M3 to M10 metric threads.

【Enhanced Usability & Compatibility】The convenient 1/4" hex shank makes these tap bits for drilling compatible with most standard drill chucks and holders for quick changes. The anti-rust black oxide coating not only prolongs the tool life but also reduces friction, allowing these metal drill bits to work smoother and last longer.

【Wide Application】This comprehensive hss drill bit set includes 6 essential sizes (M3, M4, M5, M6, M8, M10) to handle a wide range of tasks. Whether you're working on machinery, automotive repairs, or metal fabrication, these drill bits for tapping provide everything needed for professional-grade results on various metal drill bits for hard steel projects.
description: Professional 3-in-1 HSS Drill and Tap Set for Maximum Efficiency Experience the ultimate convenience in metalworking with our HSS drill bit set . This all-in-one tap and die set is engineered to drill and thread in one step , saving you time and effort on every project. 3-in-1 Multi-Function: These innovative drill and tap bits combine drilling and tapping operations in a single tool. The twisted spiral flutes design ensures efficient chip removal for cleaner threads. Premium HSS Material: Made from high-speed steel, these metal drill bits maintain sharpness and durability even when working on hard steel and other tough metals. Complete Size Range: This comprehensive drill bits set includes M3, M4, M5, M6, M8, and M10 sizes, covering most common metric threading needs. User-Friendly Design: Features a 1/4" hex shank for quick tool changes and anti-rust coating for extended tool life. These taps drill bits tools are suitable for both professionals and DIY enthusiasts.
